page_content:
Before the First Day of Classes . . 100% refund

During first 5 days of classes . . . . 100% refund

After day 5 of schedule adjustment through the end of the schedule adjustment . . . . .80% refund

After the Schedule Adjustment Period . . . .0% refund

Courses taken through the Maryland English Institute (MEI) are not considered in even exchange calculations. For Summer, Winter, 12-week terms, and non- standard courses, view the associated calendar found at registrar.umd.edu/calendars for the no charge drop period deadlines.

PHOTO BY STEPHANIE S. CORDLE |
